title: Motion Design System from Michelin
content: Motion from Directories: Components: Motion is a Michelin Design System, developed as an extension of the Brand Center to streamline digital product creation. It offers a set of ready-to-use components, tools, and guidelines, ensuring consistency and efficiency across platforms. Already used in over 200 products, the system is continuously evolving with contributions from a broad community of designers and developers. Its modular approach ensures flexibility, while accessibility and user experience remain key priorities. Motion Design System is designed to adapt, grow, and improve, making it a valuable resource for teams building digital experiences within Michelin and beyond.
